name: cabt-viewer
description: Svelte viewer for CABT battle states and replays.

scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run dev:engine & engine_pid=$!; trap "kill $engine_pid 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; npm run dev:web'
scripts.dev:lan: sh -c 'npm run dev:engine:lan & engine_pid=$!; trap "kill $engine_pid 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; npm run dev:web:lan'
scripts.generate:cabt-data:docker: docker run --rm --platform linux/amd64 -v "$PWD:/workspace" -w /workspace python:3.11-slim python scripts/generate-cabt-metadata.py
